# PHIL.004 ? Epicureanism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** epicureanism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Pleasure (especially absence of pain) as highest good; atomistic materialism; moderate enjoyment; friendship and simple living

## Application
Seek sustainable pleasure and pain avoidance; value tranquility over intensity; reduce unnecessary desires; prioritize lasting contentment

## Key Values
- Ataraxia (tranquility)
- Modest pleasure
- Friendship
- Freedom from fear

## Tags
philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, epicureanism
